# AI Receptionist Phase B Manual Lead Log Template

Use this as a private spreadsheet/Notion/CRM structure. Do not store this as public data.

Columns:
| Column | Description | Example |
|--------|-------------|---------|
| receivedAt | When email lead was received | 2026-... |
| businessName | Merchant business name | Example Nail |
| industry | Nail/Spa/Restaurant/Barber/Other | Nail salon |
| country | Country | Czech Republic |
| city | City | Prague |
| contactName | Contact person | Owner name |
| contactEmail | Contact email | private |
| contactPhone | Contact phone | private |
| languagesNeeded | Languages requested | Vietnamese, Czech |
| missedCallsEstimate | Estimated missed calls/day | 5 |
| desiredAutomation | Intake/booking/multilingual/etc. | Booking request |
| status | new/contacted/needs_more_info/demo_scheduled/qualified/not_ready/rejected/archived | new |
| owner | Internal owner | TBD |
| nextAction | Next step | Schedule demo |
| followUpDate | Follow-up date | 2026-... |
| retentionDeleteDate | Planned deletion date | 2026-... |
| notes | Internal notes | No sensitive extras |

Statuses:
- new
- contacted
- needs_more_info
- demo_scheduled
- qualified
- not_ready
- rejected
- archived

Access rules:
- private only
- no public sharing
- no forwarding PII outside authorized team
- delete on request
